title: Decisions index — six load-bearing choices
summary: Index page linking to six ADR-style decision deep-dives that govern the homestead fork of nanoclaw v2.
notes: Index/aggregator doc, not itself an ADR. References six ADR deep-dives under decisions/. No Status/Decision/Consequences sections, no acceptance markers — content is navigation + rationale prose. The referenced decisions/0X-*.md files are the actual ADRs and should be classified individually.
